U

updateCancelledEntrants(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Moves an entrant from the selectedEntrantIds array to the cancelledEntrantIds array in Firestore when the organizer cancels their invitation.
updateDeclinedEntrants(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Moves an entrant from the selectedEntrantIds array to the declinedEntrantIds array in Firestore when they decline their lottery invitation.
updateDrawSize(String, int, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Updates the draw size for the lottery pool in Firestore.
updateEntrant(Entrant, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB
Updates an existing entrant document in Firestore with the current state of the provided Entrant object.
updateEvent(Event, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EventDB
Updates an existing event in Firestore.
updateNotificationPreference(String, boolean, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB
Updates the entrant's notification preference in Firestore.
updateOrganizer(Organizer, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.OrganizerDB
Updates an existing organizer document in Firestore with the current state of the provided Organizer object.
updateSelectedEntrants(String, List<String>, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.LotteryDB
Updates the selectedEntrantIds array in Firestore after a lottery draw.
useAppContext() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.ExampleInstrumentedTest
